title: Domain Impact Matrix - Factual Source
content:
Domain exposure and impact framing:
- Financial and banking contexts: document classification, entity extraction, and risk-related workflow support.
- Insurance contexts: contract and claims-oriented automation with compliance-sensitive processing.
- Healthcare contexts: OCR and NLP systems for medical document interpretation and structured extraction.
- Enterprise knowledge contexts: semantic retrieval and search across large text corpora.

Consistent delivery pattern across domains:
- Start from domain constraints and document characteristics.
- Build tailored extraction and classification pipelines.
- Integrate outputs into existing operational workflows.
- Measure impact through efficiency, quality, and reliability improvements.

Narrative utility for retrieval:
- Helps answer prompts about industry breadth and transferability of ML practices.
- Supports concrete explanations of how similar engineering methods adapt to different domains.
